1	# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
2	"""Broker adapters — interface chung + PHS FLEX + DNSE OpenAPI + Paper (mô phỏng).
3	
4	Chọn broker theo account profile: "broker": "phs" (mặc định) | "dnse".
5	PaperBroker dùng quote THẬT (từ PHS datafeed hoặc DNSE market data tùy broker
6	của profile) nhưng khớp mô phỏng, tiền/danh mục ảo data/bot_paper_<label>.json.
7	
8	PHSBroker: lệnh thật qua phs_flex_api — hiện PHS chưa cấp client_id/secret riêng
9	nên place_order bị từ chối (-700003) cho tới khi có cặp khóa.
10	DNSEBroker: lệnh thật qua dnse_api (API key + HMAC; trading-token 8h bằng OTP).
11	
12	Field name chưa chuẩn hóa hết → qget() thử nhiều tên; payload thô ghi vào
13	data/execution_logs/<broker>_raw_<date>.jsonl để tinh chỉnh mapping.
14	"""
15	
16	import datetime as dt
17	import json
18	import os
19	import sys
20	import uuid
21	
22	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))
23	
24	from .config import DATA_DIR, EXEC_DIR
25	from .vn_market import normalize_price_vnd
26	
27	PAPER_STATE_FILE = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, "bot_paper_account.json")  # legacy (label main)
28	DEFAULT_CREDENTIALS = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, "phs_credentials.json")
29	DEFAULT_DNSE_CREDENTIALS = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, "dnse_credentials.json")
30	
31	# Pool FlexClient theo credentials file: nhiều tiểu khoản chung 1 login dùng chung
32	# client + token (login lại nhiều lần có thể vô hiệu token cũ của nhau).
33	_FLEX_POOL = {}
34	
35	
36	def get_flex_client(credentials_file=None):
37	    from phs_flex_api import FlexClient
38	    path = os.path.abspath(credentials_file or DEFAULT_CREDENTIALS)
39	    if path in _FLEX_POOL:
40	        return _FLEX_POOL[path]
41	    if path == os.path.abspath(DEFAULT_CREDENTIALS):
42	        token_cache = None                     # dùng cache mặc định của wrapper
43	    else:
44	        stem = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(path))[0]
45	        token_cache = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, f"phs_flex_token_{stem}.json")
46	    try:
47	        kw = {"token_cache": token_cache} if token_cache else {}
48	        c = FlexClient.from_credentials_file(path=path, **kw)
49	    except FileNotFoundError:
50	        c = FlexClient()
51	    _FLEX_POOL[path] = c
52	    return c
53	
54	
55	# Pool DNSEClient theo credentials file (api_key/secret + trading-token cache chung)
56	_DNSE_POOL = {}
57	
58	
59	def get_dnse_client(credentials_file=None):
60	    from dnse_api import DNSEClient
61	    path = os.path.abspath(credentials_file or DEFAULT_DNSE_CREDENTIALS)
62	    if path not in _DNSE_POOL:
63	        _DNSE_POOL[path] = DNSEClient.from_credentials_file(path=path)
64	    return _DNSE_POOL[path]
65	
66	
67	def qget(d, *names, default=None):
68	    """Lấy giá trị đầu tiên khác None theo danh sách tên khóa (không phân biệt hoa/thường)."""
69	    if not isinstance(d, dict):
70	        return default
71	    lower = {str(k).lower(): v for k, v in d.items()}
72	    for n in names:
73	        v = lower.get(n.lower())
74	        if v not in (None, "", "null"):
75	            return v
76	    return default
77	
78	
79	def _fnum(x):
80	    try:
81	        return float(x)
82	    except (TypeError, ValueError):
83	        return None
84	
85	
86	class Quote:
87	    """Snapshot giá chuẩn hóa từ payload instrument PHS (mọi giá VND)."""
88	
89	    def __init__(self, raw):
90	        self.raw = raw
91	        p = lambda *n: normalize_price_vnd(_fnum(qget(raw, *n)))
92	        self.symbol = qget(raw, "symbol", "instrument", "code", "sym")
93	        self.exchange = qget(raw, "exchange", "market", "floorcode", default="HOSE")
94	        self.last = p("lastprice", "last", "matchprice", "closeprice", "close", "price")
95	        self.ref = p("refprice", "reference", "basicprice", "referenceprice",
96	                     "priorcloseprice", "ref")
97	        self.ceiling = p("ceiling", "ceilingprice", "ce", "highlimit")
98	        self.floor = p("floor", "floorprice", "fl", "lowlimit")
99	        self.bid = p("bestbid1price", "bidprice1", "bestbid", "b1", "bidprice")
100	        self.ask = p("bestoffer1price", "askprice1", "offerprice1", "bestoffer", "o1", "askprice")
101	        v = _fnum(qget(raw, "totaltrading", "totalvolumetraded", "totalvolume",
102	                       "accumulatedvolume", "totalvol", "nmtotaltradedqty",
103	                       "totaltradingqtty", "volume"))
104	        self.day_volume = v  # KL khớp lũy kế trong ngày (có thể None)
105	
106	    def ok(self):
107	        return self.last is not None or self.ref is not None
108	
109	    def __repr__(self):
110	        return (f"Quote({self.symbol} last={self.last} ref={self.ref} "
111	                f"bid={self.bid} ask={self.ask} ce={self.ceiling} fl={self.floor} "
112	                f"vol={self.day_volume})")
113	
114	
115	class OrderUpdate:
116	    """Trạng thái 1 lệnh từ sổ lệnh broker."""
117	
118	    def __init__(self, order_id, status="", [REDACTED]_qty=0, avg_price=None, raw=None):
119	        self.order_id = str(order_id)
120	        self.status = str(status)
121	        self.[REDACTED]_qty = int([REDACTED]_qty or 0)
122	        self.avg_price = avg_price
123	        self.raw = raw
124	
125	    @property
126	    def is_dead(self):
127	        """Lệnh không còn sống (hủy/từ chối/khớp hết) — best-effort theo status string."""
128	        s = self.status.lower()
129	        if "partial" in s:        # PartiallyFilled (DNSE) vẫn đang sống
130	            return False
131	        return any(k in s for k in ("cancel", "hủy", "huy", "reject", "từ chối",
132	                                    "fill", "khớp hết", "matchall", "expire", "f", "x"))
133	
134	
135	# --------------------------------------------------------------------- base
136	
137	class BrokerBase:
138	    name = "base"
139	    can_trade_live = False
140	    _raw_log = None          # path jsonl ghi payload thô (set ở subclass)
141	
142	    def _log_raw(self, kind, payload):
143	        if not self._raw_log:
144	            return
145	        try:
146	            os.makedirs(EXEC_DIR, exist_ok=True)
147	            with open(self._raw_log, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
148	                f.write(json.dumps({"ts": dt.datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
149	                                    "kind": kind, "payload": payload},
150	                                   ensure_ascii=False, default=str) + "\n")
151	        except OSError:
152	            pass
153	
154	    def connect(self):
155	        raise NotImplementedError
156	
157	    def get_cash(self):
158	        """Tiền mặt khả dụng (VND)."""
159	        raise NotImplementedError
160	
161	    def get_positions(self):
162	        """→ {symbol: {"total": n, "sellable": n}}."""
163	        raise NotImplementedError
164	
165	    def get_quote(self, symbol):
166	        """→ Quote | None."""
167	        raise NotImplementedError
168	
169	    def get_nav(self):
170	        cash = self.get_cash()
171	        pos = self.get_positions()
172	        mv = 0.0
173	        for sym, p in pos.items():
174	            q = self.get_quote(sym)
175	            px = (q.last or q.ref) if q and q.ok() else 0
176	            mv += p["total"] * (px or 0)
177	        return cash + mv
178	
179	    def place_order(self, symbol, qty, side, price=None, order_type="LO"):
180	        """→ order_id (str)."""
181	        raise NotImplementedError
182	
183	    def cancel_order(self, order_id):
184	        raise NotImplementedError
185	
186	    def poll_orders(self):
187	        """→ {order_id: OrderUpdate} cho các lệnh trong ngày."""
188	        raise NotImplementedError
189	
190	
191	# ---------------------------------------------------------------- PHS live
192	
193	class PHSBroker(BrokerBase):
194	    name = "phs"
195	    can_trade_live = True
196	
197	    def __init__(self, account_id=None, otp=None, quote_only=False,
198	                 credentials_file=None, label="main"):
199	        self.account_id = account_id
200	        self.label = label
201	        self._otp = otp
202	        self.quote_only = quote_only   # chỉ dùng datafeed, không cần login đủ
203	        self.credentials_file = credentials_file
204	        self.client = None
205	        self._quote_cache = {}      # symbol -> (ts, Quote)
206	        self._quote_ttl = 3.0       # giây
207	        self._raw_log = os.path.join(
208	            EXEC_DIR, f"phs_raw_{dt.date.today():%Y-%m-%d}.jsonl")
209	
210	    def connect(self):
211	        self.client = get_flex_client(self.credentials_file)
212	        if self.quote_only:
213	            print("[phs] chế độ quote-only (datafeed)")
214	            return self
215	        if not self.client.access_token:
216	            raise RuntimeError(f"PHS login thất bại ({self.label}) — kiểm tra "
217	                               f"{self.credentials_file or 'data/phs_credentials.json'}")
218	        if self.account_id is None:
219	            accs = self.client.sub_accounts()
220	            self._log_raw("sub_accounts", accs)
221	            self.account_id = accs[0]["id"]
222	        if self._otp is not None and not getattr(self.client, "_otp_verified", False):
223	            self.client.verify_smart_otp(self._otp)
224	            self.client._otp_verified = True   # 1 lần / login, dùng chung các tiểu khoản
225	            print(f"[phs] Smart OTP đã xác thực ({self.label})")
226	        print(f"[phs] kết nối OK [{self.label}] tiểu khoản {self.account_id}")
227	        return self
228	
229	    def get_cash(self):
230	        bal = self.client.cash_balance(self.account_id)
231	        self._log_raw("cash_balance", bal)
232	        row = bal[0] if isinstance(bal, list) and bal else bal
233	        v = _fnum(qget(row, "pp", "balance", "avlcash", "cashbal", default=0))
234	        return v or 0.0
235	
236	    def get_positions(self):
237	        port = self.client.portfolio(self.account_id) or []
238	        self._log_raw("portfolio", port)
239	        out = {}
240	        for p in port:
241	            sym = qget(p, "symbol", "instrument", "code")
242	            total = int(_fnum(qget(p, "total", "totalqtty", "qty", default=0)) or 0)
243	            sellable = int(_fnum(qget(p, "trade", "avlqtty", "sellable",
244	                                      "availableqtty", default=total)) or total)
245	            if sym and total > 0:
246	                out[sym] = {"total": total, "sellable": sellable}
247	        return out
248	
249	    def get_quote(self, symbol):
250	        import time as _t
251	        hit = self._quote_cache.get(symbol)
252	        if hit and _t.time() - hit[0] < self._quote_ttl:
253	            return hit[1]
254	        try:
255	            rows = self.client.instruments(symbols=symbol)
256	        except Exception as e:
257	            print(f"[phs] ⚠ quote {symbol} lỗi: {e}")
258	            return None
259	        row = rows[0] if isinstance(rows, list) and rows else rows
260	        q = Quote(row) if isinstance(row, dict) else None
261	        if q and not q.ok():
262	            self._log_raw("quote_unmapped", row)   # mapping field chưa khớp → cần xem raw
263	        self._quote_cache[symbol] = (_t.time(), q)
264	        return q
265	
266	    def place_order(self, symbol, qty, side, price=None, order_type="LO"):
267	        r = self.client.place_order(self.account_id, symbol, qty=int(qty), side=side,
268	                                    order_type=order_type, price=price)
269	        self._log_raw("place_order", {"req": [symbol, qty, side, price, order_type],
270	                                      "resp": r})
271	        oid = qget(r, "orderId", "orderid", "id")
272	        if not oid:
273	            raise RuntimeError(f"place_order không trả orderId: {r}")
274	        return str(oid)
275	
276	    def cancel_order(self, order_id):
277	        r = self.client.cancel_order(self.account_id, order_id)
278	        self._log_raw("cancel_order", {"order_id": order_id, "resp": r})
279	        return r
280	
281	    def poll_orders(self):
282	        rows = self.client.daily_orders(self.account_id) or []
283	        self._log_raw("daily_orders", rows)
284	        out = {}
285	        for o in rows:
286	            oid = qget(o, "orderid", "orderId", "id")
287	            if oid is None:
288	                continue
289	            [REDACTED] = _fnum(qget(o, "execqtty", "matchedqtty", "matchqtty",
290	                                "cumqty", "fillqty", "matchedqty", default=0)) or 0
291	            avg = normalize_price_vnd(_fnum(qget(o, "avgprice", "matchprice",
292	                                                 "execprice", "avgpx")))
293	            out[str(oid)] = OrderUpdate(oid, qget(o, "status", "orderstatus",
294	                                                  default=""), [REDACTED], avg, raw=o)
295	        return out
296	
297	
298	# --------------------------------------------------------------- DNSE live
299	
300	class DNSEBroker(BrokerBase):
301	    """DNSE OpenAPI v2 (dnse_api.DNSEClient).
302	
303	    Inquiry + market data chỉ cần api_key/secret (ký HMAC, không login);
304	    đặt/sửa/hủy lệnh cần trading-token (OTP smart/email, hiệu lực 8h, tự cache
305	    trong data/dnse_trading_token*.json — còn hạn thì không cần --otp).
306	    """
307	
308	    name = "dnse"
309	    can_trade_live = True
310	
311	    def __init__(self, account_id=None, otp=None, quote_only=False,
312	                 credentials_file=None, label="main"):
313	        self.account_id = account_id
314	        self.label = label
315	        self._otp = otp
316	        self.quote_only = quote_only
317	        self.credentials_file = credentials_file
318	        self.client = None
319	        self._quote_cache = {}      # symbol -> (ts, Quote)
320	        self._secdef_cache = {}     # symbol -> dict (trần/sàn/ref — tĩnh trong ngày)
321	        self._quote_ttl = 3.0
322	        self._raw_log = os.path.join(
323	            EXEC_DIR, f"dnse_raw_{dt.date.today():%Y-%m-%d}.jsonl")
324	
325	    def connect(self):
326	        self.client = get_dnse_client(self.credentials_file)
327	        if self.quote_only:
328	            print("[dnse] chế độ quote-only (market data)")
329	            return self
330	        if self.account_id is None:
331	            accs = self.client.accounts()
332	            self._log_raw("accounts", accs)
333	            rows = accs.get("accounts") if isinstance(accs, dict) else accs
334	            if not rows:
335	                raise RuntimeError(f"[dnse:{self.label}] không thấy tiểu khoản: {accs}")
336	            self.account_id = qget(rows[0], "id", "accountno", "account")
337	        if self._otp is not None and not self.client.has_trading_token():
338	            self.client.create_trading_token(self._otp)
339	            print(f"[dnse] trading-token đã tạo ({self.label}, hạn 8h)")
340	        if not self.client.has_trading_token():
341	            print(f"[dnse] ⚠ chưa có trading-token ({self.label}) — inquiry OK, "
342	                  f"đặt lệnh sẽ bị từ chối (cần --otp; [REDACTED]: gửi mã bằng "
343	                  f"--send-otp trước)")
344	        print(f"[dnse] kết nối OK [{self.label}] tiểu khoản {self.account_id}")
345	        return self
346	
347	    def get_cash(self):
348	        bal = self.client.balances(self.account_id)
349	        self._log_raw("balances", bal)
350	        row = bal[0] if isinstance(bal, list) and bal else bal
351	        if isinstance(row, dict) and isinstance(row.get("stock"), dict):
352	            row = row["stock"]          # balances thật: {"stock": {...}, "derivative": {...}}
353	        v = _fnum(qget(row, "availablecash", "withdrawablecash", "purchasingpower",
354	                       "cashavailable", "totalcash", "cash", "balance",
355	                       default=0))
356	        return v or 0.0
357	
358	    def get_positions(self):
359	        r = self.client.positions(self.account_id)
360	        self._log_raw("positions", r)
361	        rows = r.get("positions") or r.get("data") if isinstance(r, dict) else r
362	        out = {}
363	        for p in rows or []:
364	            if str(qget(p, "status", default="OPEN")).upper() == "CLOSED":
365	                continue
366	            sym = qget(p, "symbol", "instrument", "code")
367	            total = int(_fnum(qget(p, "openquantity", "quantity", "totalquantity",
368	                                   "qty", default=0)) or 0)
369	            # tradeQuantity = KL bán được (đã về); accumulate có thể gồm CP chờ về
370	            sellable = int(_fnum(qget(p, "tradequantity", "availablequantity",
371	                                      "sellablequantity", "availableqty",
372	                                      default=total)) or total)
373	            if sym and total > 0:
374	                out[sym] = {"total": total, "sellable": sellable}
375	        return out
376	
377	    @staticmethod
378	    def _pick_board(payload, list_key):
379	        """Payload DNSE: list các board (G1 lô chẵn, G4 lô lẻ, T* thỏa thuận)
380	        hoặc dict {list_key: [...]}. → dict của board G1 (ưu tiên) / đầu tiên."""
381	        rows = payload
382	        if isinstance(payload, dict):
383	            rows = payload.get(list_key) or payload.get("data") or [payload]
384	        if not isinstance(rows, list):
385	            return {}
386	        g1 = [r for r in rows if isinstance(r, dict) and r.get("boardId") == "G1"]
387	        rows = g1 or [r for r in rows if isinstance(r, dict)]
388	        return rows[0] if rows else {}
389	
390	    def get_quote(self, symbol):
391	        import time as _t
392	        hit = self._quote_cache.get(symbol)
393	        if hit and _t.time() - hit[0] < self._quote_ttl:
394	            return hit[1]
395	        raw = {"symbol": symbol}
396	        # 1) secdef (trần/sàn/tham chiếu theo board) — tĩnh, cache cả phiên
397	        sd = self._secdef_cache.get(symbol)
398	        if sd is None:
399	            try:
400	                sd = self._pick_board(self.client.secdef(symbol), "secdefs")
401	                self._secdef_cache[symbol] = sd
402	            except Exception as e:
403	                sd = {}
404	                print(f"[dnse] ⚠ secdef {symbol} lỗi: {e}")
405	        raw.update(sd)
406	        # 2) khớp lệnh mới nhất — {"trades":[board G1: matchPrice, totalVolumeTraded]}
407	        try:
408	            raw.update(self._pick_board(self.client.latest_trade(symbol), "trades"))
409	        except Exception as e:
410	            print(f"[dnse] ⚠ trade {symbol} lỗi: {e}")
411	        # 3) top giá chờ — {"quotes":[board G1: bid/offer = [{price, quantity},…]]}
412	        try:
413	            qt = self._pick_board(self.client.latest_quote(symbol), "quotes")
414	            for side_key, flat in (("bid", "bidPrice1"), ("bids", "bidPrice1"),
415	                                   ("offer", "offerPrice1"), ("offers", "offerPrice1"),
416	                                   ("asks", "offerPrice1")):
417	                arr = qt.get(side_key) if isinstance(qt, dict) else None
418	                if isinstance(arr, list) and arr:
419	                    top = arr[0]
420	                    raw.setdefault(flat, qget(top, "price", "p")
421	                                   if isinstance(top, dict) else top)
422	            if isinstance(qt, dict):
423	                raw.update({k: v for k, v in qt.items()
424	                            if not isinstance(v, (list, dict)) and k not in raw})
425	        except Exception as e:
426	            print(f"[dnse] ⚠ quote {symbol} lỗi: {e}")
427	        q = Quote(raw)
428	        if not q.ok():
429	            self._log_raw("quote_unmapped", raw)
430	        self._quote_cache[symbol] = (_t.time(), q)
431	        return q
432	
433	    def place_order(self, symbol, qty, side, price=None, order_type="LO"):
434	        r = self.client.place_order(self.account_id, symbol, qty=int(qty),
435	                                    side=side, order_type=order_type, price=price)
436	        self._log_raw("place_order", {"req": [symbol, qty, side, price, order_type],
437	                                      "resp": r})
438	        oid = qget(r, "id", "orderid", "orderId")
439	        if oid is None:
440	            raise RuntimeError(f"place_order không trả id: {r}")
441	        return str(oid)
442	
443	    def cancel_order(self, order_id):
444	        r = self.client.cancel_order(self.account_id, order_id)
445	        self._log_raw("cancel_order", {"order_id": order_id, "resp": r})
446	        return r
447	
448	    def poll_orders(self):
449	        r = self.client.orders(self.account_id)
450	        self._log_raw("orders", r)
451	        rows = r.get("orders") or r.get("data") if isinstance(r, dict) else r
452	        out = {}
453	        for o in rows or []:
454	            oid = qget(o, "id", "orderid", "orderId")
455	            if oid is None:
456	                continue
457	            [REDACTED] = _fnum(qget(o, "fillquantity", "[REDACTED]quantity", "cumqty",
458	                                "matchedquantity", "fillqty", "execqtty",
459	                                default=0)) or 0
460	            avg = normalize_price_vnd(_fnum(qget(o, "averageprice", "avgprice",
461	                                                 "fillprice", "matchprice")))
462	            out[str(oid)] = OrderUpdate(oid, qget(o, "orderstatus", "status",
463	                                                  default=""), [REDACTED], avg, raw=o)
464	        return out
465	
466	
467	# --------------------------------------------------------------- Paper sim
468	
469	class PaperBroker(BrokerBase):
470	    """Khớp mô phỏng trên quote thật. Lệnh LO mua khớp khi limit ≥ ask (hoặc last),
471	    bán khớp khi limit ≤ bid (hoặc last); ATO/ATC khớp ngay tại ref/last.
472	    Trạng thái tiền + danh mục: data/bot_paper_account.json (bền qua nhiều phiên).
473	    """
474	
475	    name = "paper"
476	    can_trade_live = False
477	
478	    def __init__(self, init_cash=1_000_000_000, fee_rate=0.0015, quote_source=None,
479	                 fill_at_ref_if_no_quote=False, label="main"):
480	        self.fee_rate = fee_rate
481	        self.quote_source = quote_source        # PHSBroker (chỉ dùng quote) hoặc None
482	        self.fill_at_ref = fill_at_ref_if_no_quote
483	        self.label = label
484	        self.state_file = (PAPER_STATE_FILE if label == "main"
485	                           else os.path.join(DATA_DIR, f"bot_paper_{label}.json"))
486	        self._init_cash = init_cash
487	        self.state = None
488	        self._fallback_ref = {}                 # symbol -> ref_price từ plan (offline)
489	
490	    def connect(self):
491	        if self.quote_source is not None:
492	            try:
493	                if self.quote_source.client is None:
494	                    self.quote_source.connect()
495	            except Exception as e:
496	                print(f"[paper] ⚠ không kết nối được PHS quote ({e}) — "
497	                      f"dùng ref_price của plan làm giá mô phỏng")
498	                self.quote_source = None
499	        self._load()
500	        print(f"[paper] tài khoản ảo [{self.label}]: cash "
501	              f"{self.state['cash']/1e6:,.0f}M, {len(self.state['positions'])} mã")
502	        return self
503	
504	    # ----- state -----
505	    def _load(self):
506	        if os.path.exists(self.state_file):
507	            with open(self.state_file, encoding="utf-8") as f:
508	                self.state = json.load(f)
509	        else:
510	            self.state = {"cash": self._init_cash, "positions": {},
511	                          "open_orders": {}, "fills": [], "next_id": 1}
512	            self._save()
513	        self.state.setdefault("open_orders", {})
514	        self.state.setdefault("fills", [])
515	
516	    def _save(self):
517	        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(self.state_file), exist_ok=True)
518	        with open(self.state_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
519	            json.dump(self.state, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
520	
521	    def set_fallback_refs(self, mapping):
522	        """{symbol: ref_price} từ plan — giá mô phỏng khi không có quote PHS."""
523	        self._fallback_ref.update(mapping or {})
524	
525	    # ----- interface -----
526	    def get_cash(self):
527	        return float(self.state["cash"])
528	
529	    def get_positions(self):
530	        return {s: {"total": int(q), "sellable": int(q)}
531	                for s, q in self.state["positions"].items() if q > 0}
532	
533	    def get_quote(self, symbol):
534	        if self.quote_source is not None:
535	            q = self.quote_source.get_quote(symbol)
536	            if q and q.ok():
537	                return q
538	        ref = self._fallback_ref.get(symbol)
539	        if ref:
540	            return Quote({"symbol": symbol, "refPrice": ref, "lastPrice": ref})
541	        return None
542	
543	    def place_order(self, symbol, qty, side, price=None, order_type="LO"):
544	        oid = f"P{self.state['next_id']:06d}"
545	        self.state["next_id"] += 1
546	        self.state["open_orders"][oid] = {
547	            "symbol": symbol, "qty": int(qty), "side": side, "price": price,
548	            "type": order_type, "[REDACTED]": 0, "status": "open",
549	            "ts": dt.datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds")}
550	        self._try_fill(oid)
551	        self._save()
552	        return oid
553	
554	    def cancel_order(self, order_id):
555	        o = self.state["open_orders"].get(order_id)
556	        if o and o["status"] == "open":
557	            o["status"] = "cancelled"
558	            self._save()
559	        return {"orderId": order_id, "status": "cancelled"}
560	
561	    def poll_orders(self):
562	        for oid in list(self.state["open_orders"]):
563	            self._try_fill(oid)
564	        self._save()
565	        return {oid: OrderUpdate(oid, o["status"], o["[REDACTED]"], o.get("avg_price"))
566	                for oid, o in self.state["open_orders"].items()}
567	
568	    # ----- fill engine -----
569	    def _try_fill(self, oid):
570	        o = self.state["open_orders"][oid]
571	        if o["status"] != "open":
572	            return
573	        q = self.get_quote(o["symbol"])
574	        if q is None or not q.ok():
575	            return
576	        last = q.last or q.ref
577	        fill_px = None
578	        if o["type"] in ("ATO", "ATC"):
579	            fill_px = last
580	        elif o["price"] is None:
581	            fill_px = last
582	        else:
583	            if o["side"] == "buy":
584	                mkt = q.ask or last
585	                if mkt is not None and o["price"] >= mkt:
586	                    fill_px = min(o["price"], mkt)
587	            else:
588	                mkt = q.bid or last
589	                if mkt is not None and o["price"] <= mkt:
590	                    fill_px = mkt
591	        if fill_px is None:
592	            return
593	        qty = o["qty"] - o["[REDACTED]"]
594	        value = qty * fill_px
595	        fee = value * self.fee_rate
596	        if o["side"] == "buy":
597	            if self.state["cash"] < value + fee:
598	                o["status"] = "rejected_cash"
599	                return
600	            self.state["cash"] -= value + fee
601	            self.state["positions"][o["symbol"]] = \
602	                self.state["positions"].get(o["symbol"], 0) + qty
603	        else:
604	            have = self.state["positions"].get(o["symbol"], 0)
605	            if have < qty:
606	                o["status"] = "rejected_qty"
607	                return
608	            self.state["cash"] += value - fee
609	            self.state["positions"][o["symbol"]] = have - qty
610	        o["[REDACTED]"] = o["qty"]
611	        o["avg_price"] = fill_px
612	        o["status"] = "[REDACTED]"
613	        self.state["fills"].append(
614	            {"ts": dt.datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"), "order_id": oid,
615	             "symbol": o["symbol"], "side": o["side"], "qty": qty,
616	             "price": fill_px, "fee": round(fee)})
617	
618	
619	BROKER_CLASSES = {"phs": PHSBroker, "dnse": DNSEBroker}
620	
621	# Pool nguồn quote dùng chung (1 per broker-type × credentials) cho paper accounts
622	_QUOTE_POOL = {}
623	
624	
625	def get_quote_source(broker_type, credentials_file=None):
626	    key = (broker_type, os.path.abspath(credentials_file or "default"))
627	    if key not in _QUOTE_POOL:
628	        cls = BROKER_CLASSES[broker_type]
629	        _QUOTE_POOL[key] = cls(quote_only=True, credentials_file=credentials_file)
630	    return _QUOTE_POOL[key]
631	
632	
633	def make_broker(cfg, otp=None, need_quotes=True, profile=None, quote_src=None):
634	    """Factory theo mode + broker. profile = account profile
635	    (label/broker/credentials_file/account_id); broker: "phs" | "dnse".
636	    quote_src override nguồn quote cho paper (mặc định pool theo broker)."""
637	    p = profile or {"label": "main", "credentials_file": None,
638	                    "account_id": cfg.get("account_id")}
639	    btype = (p.get("broker") or cfg.get("broker") or "phs").lower()
640	    if btype not in BROKER_CLASSES:
641	        raise KeyError(f"broker '{btype}' không hỗ trợ — có: {sorted(BROKER_CLASSES)}")
642	    if cfg["mode"] == "live":
643	        return BROKER_CLASSES[btype](account_id=p.get("account_id"), otp=otp,
644	                                     credentials_file=p.get("credentials_file"),
645	                                     label=p["label"])
646	    if quote_src is None and need_quotes:
647	        quote_src = get_quote_source(btype, p.get("credentials_file"))
648	    return PaperBroker(init_cash=cfg["paper_init_cash"],
649	                       fee_rate=cfg["paper_fee_rate"],
650	                       quote_source=quote_src, label=p["label"])
651

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Broker adapters — interface chung + PHS FLEX + DNSE OpenAPI + Paper (mô phỏng).

Chọn broker theo account profile: "broker": "phs" (mặc định) | "dnse".
PaperBroker dùng quote THẬT (từ PHS datafeed hoặc DNSE market data tùy broker
của profile) nhưng khớp mô phỏng, tiền/danh mục ảo data/bot_paper_<label>.json.

PHSBroker: lệnh thật qua phs_flex_api — hiện PHS chưa cấp client_id/secret riêng
nên place_order bị từ chối (-700003) cho tới khi có cặp khóa.
DNSEBroker: lệnh thật qua dnse_api (API key + HMAC; trading-token 8h bằng OTP).

Field name chưa chuẩn hóa hết → qget() thử nhiều tên; payload thô ghi vào
data/execution_logs/<broker>_raw_<date>.jsonl để tinh chỉnh mapping.
"""

import datetime as dt
import json
import os
import sys
import uuid

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))

from .config import DATA_DIR, EXEC_DIR
from .vn_market import normalize_price_vnd

PAPER_STATE_FILE = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, "bot_paper_account.json")  # legacy (label main)
DEFAULT_CREDENTIALS = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, "phs_credentials.json")
DEFAULT_DNSE_CREDENTIALS = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, "dnse_credentials.json")

# Pool FlexClient theo credentials file: nhiều tiểu khoản chung 1 login dùng chung
# client + token (login lại nhiều lần có thể vô hiệu token cũ của nhau).
_FLEX_POOL = {}


def get_flex_client(credentials_file=None):
    from phs_flex_api import FlexClient
    path = os.path.abspath(credentials_file or DEFAULT_CREDENTIALS)
    if path in _FLEX_POOL:
        return _FLEX_POOL[path]
    if path == os.path.abspath(DEFAULT_CREDENTIALS):
        token_cache = None                     # dùng cache mặc định của wrapper
    else:
        stem = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(path))[0]
        token_cache = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, f"phs_flex_token_{stem}.json")
    try:
        kw = {"token_cache": token_cache} if token_cache else {}
        c = FlexClient.from_credentials_file(path=path, **kw)
    except FileNotFoundError:
        c = FlexClient()
    _FLEX_POOL[path] = c
    return c


# Pool DNSEClient theo credentials file (api_key/secret + trading-token cache chung)
_DNSE_POOL = {}


def get_dnse_client(credentials_file=None):
    from dnse_api import DNSEClient
    path = os.path.abspath(credentials_file or DEFAULT_DNSE_CREDENTIALS)
    if path not in _DNSE_POOL:
        _DNSE_POOL[path] = DNSEClient.from_credentials_file(path=path)
    return _DNSE_POOL[path]


def qget(d, *names, default=None):
    """Lấy giá trị đầu tiên khác None theo danh sách tên khóa (không phân biệt hoa/thường)."""
    if not isinstance(d, dict):
        return default
    lower = {str(k).lower(): v for k, v in d.items()}
    for n in names:
        v = lower.get(n.lower())
        if v not in (None, "", "null"):
            return v
    return default


def _fnum(x):
    try:
        return float(x)
    except (TypeError, ValueError):
        return None


class Quote:
    """Snapshot giá chuẩn hóa từ payload instrument PHS (mọi giá VND)."""

    def __init__(self, raw):
        self.raw = raw
        p = lambda *n: normalize_price_vnd(_fnum(qget(raw, *n)))
        self.symbol = qget(raw, "symbol", "instrument", "code", "sym")
        self.exchange = qget(raw, "exchange", "market", "floorcode", default="HOSE")
        self.last = p("lastprice", "last", "matchprice", "closeprice", "close", "price")
        self.ref = p("refprice", "reference", "basicprice", "referenceprice",
                     "priorcloseprice", "ref")
        self.ceiling = p("ceiling", "ceilingprice", "ce", "highlimit")
        self.floor = p("floor", "floorprice", "fl", "lowlimit")
        self.bid = p("bestbid1price", "bidprice1", "bestbid", "b1", "bidprice")
        self.ask = p("bestoffer1price", "askprice1", "offerprice1", "bestoffer", "o1", "askprice")
        v = _fnum(qget(raw, "totaltrading", "totalvolumetraded", "totalvolume",
                       "accumulatedvolume", "totalvol", "nmtotaltradedqty",
                       "totaltradingqtty", "volume"))
        self.day_volume = v  # KL khớp lũy kế trong ngày (có thể None)

    def ok(self):
        return self.last is not None or self.ref is not None

    def __repr__(self):
        return (f"Quote({self.symbol} last={self.last} ref={self.ref} "
                f"bid={self.bid} ask={self.ask} ce={self.ceiling} fl={self.floor} "
                f"vol={self.day_volume})")


class OrderUpdate:
    """Trạng thái 1 lệnh từ sổ lệnh broker."""

    def __init__(self, order_id, status="", [REDACTED]_qty=0, avg_price=None, raw=None):
        self.order_id = str(order_id)
        self.status = str(status)
        self.[REDACTED]_qty = int([REDACTED]_qty or 0)
        self.avg_price = avg_price
        self.raw = raw

    @property
    def is_dead(self):
        """Lệnh không còn sống (hủy/từ chối/khớp hết) — best-effort theo status string."""
        s = self.status.lower()
        if "partial" in s:        # PartiallyFilled (DNSE) vẫn đang sống
            return False
        return any(k in s for k in ("cancel", "hủy", "huy", "reject", "từ chối",
                                    "fill", "khớp hết", "matchall", "expire", "f", "x"))


# --------------------------------------------------------------------- base

class BrokerBase:
    name = "base"
    can_trade_live = False
    _raw_log = None          # path jsonl ghi payload thô (set ở subclass)

    def _log_raw(self, kind, payload):
        if not self._raw_log:
            return
        try:
            os.makedirs(EXEC_DIR, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._raw_log, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(json.dumps({"ts": dt.datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
                                    "kind": kind, "payload": payload},
                                   ensure_ascii=False, default=str) + "\n")
        except OSError:
            pass

    def connect(self):
        raise NotImplementedError

    def get_cash(self):
        """Tiền mặt khả dụng (VND)."""
        raise NotImplementedError

    def get_positions(self):
        """→ {symbol: {"total": n, "sellable": n}}."""
        raise NotImplementedError

    def get_quote(self, symbol):
        """→ Quote | None."""
        raise NotImplementedError

    def get_nav(self):
        cash = self.get_cash()
        pos = self.get_positions()
        mv = 0.0
        for sym, p in pos.items():
            q = self.get_quote(sym)
            px = (q.last or q.ref) if q and q.ok() else 0
            mv += p["total"] * (px or 0)
        return cash + mv

    def place_order(self, symbol, qty, side, price=None, order_type="LO"):
        """→ order_id (str)."""
        raise NotImplementedError

    def cancel_order(self, order_id):
        raise NotImplementedError

    def poll_orders(self):
        """→ {order_id: OrderUpdate} cho các lệnh trong ngày."""
        raise NotImplementedError


# ---------------------------------------------------------------- PHS live

class PHSBroker(BrokerBase):
    name = "phs"
    can_trade_live = True

    def __init__(self, account_id=None, otp=None, quote_only=False,
                 credentials_file=None, label="main"):
        self.account_id = account_id
        self.label = label
        self._otp = otp
        self.quote_only = quote_only   # chỉ dùng datafeed, không cần login đủ
        self.credentials_file = credentials_file
        self.client = None
        self._quote_cache = {}      # symbol -> (ts, Quote)
        self._quote_ttl = 3.0       # giây
        self._raw_log = os.path.join(
            EXEC_DIR, f"phs_raw_{dt.date.today():%Y-%m-%d}.jsonl")

    def connect(self):
        self.client = get_flex_client(self.credentials_file)
        if self.quote_only:
            print("[phs] chế độ quote-only (datafeed)")
            return self
        if not self.client.access_token:
            raise RuntimeError(f"PHS login thất bại ({self.label}) — kiểm tra "
                               f"{self.credentials_file or 'data/phs_credentials.json'}")
        if self.account_id is None:
            accs = self.client.sub_accounts()
            self._log_raw("sub_accounts", accs)
            self.account_id = accs[0]["id"]
        if self._otp is not None and not getattr(self.client, "_otp_verified", False):
            self.client.verify_smart_otp(self._otp)
            self.client._otp_verified = True   # 1 lần / login, dùng chung các tiểu khoản
            print(f"[phs] Smart OTP đã xác thực ({self.label})")
        print(f"[phs] kết nối OK [{self.label}] tiểu khoản {self.account_id}")
        return self

    def get_cash(self):
        bal = self.client.cash_balance(self.account_id)
        self._log_raw("cash_balance", bal)
        row = bal[0] if isinstance(bal, list) and bal else bal
        v = _fnum(qget(row, "pp", "balance", "avlcash", "cashbal", default=0))
        return v or 0.0

    def get_positions(self):
        port = self.client.portfolio(self.account_id) or []
        self._log_raw("portfolio", port)
        out = {}
        for p in port:
            sym = qget(p, "symbol", "instrument", "code")
            total = int(_fnum(qget(p, "total", "totalqtty", "qty", default=0)) or 0)
            sellable = int(_fnum(qget(p, "trade", "avlqtty", "sellable",
                                      "availableqtty", default=total)) or total)
            if sym and total > 0:
                out[sym] = {"total": total, "sellable": sellable}
        return out

    def get_quote(self, symbol):
        import time as _t
        hit = self._quote_cache.get(symbol)
        if hit and _t.time() - hit[0] < self._quote_ttl:
            return hit[1]
        try:
            rows = self.client.instruments(symbols=symbol)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[phs] ⚠ quote {symbol} lỗi: {e}")
            return None
        row = rows[0] if isinstance(rows, list) and rows else rows
        q = Quote(row) if isinstance(row, dict) else None
        if q and not q.ok():
            self._log_raw("quote_unmapped", row)   # mapping field chưa khớp → cần xem raw
        self._quote_cache[symbol] = (_t.time(), q)
        return q

    def place_order(self, symbol, qty, side, price=None, order_type="LO"):
        r = self.client.place_order(self.account_id, symbol, qty=int(qty), side=side,
                                    order_type=order_type, price=price)
        self._log_raw("place_order", {"req": [symbol, qty, side, price, order_type],
                                      "resp": r})
        oid = qget(r, "orderId", "orderid", "id")
        if not oid:
            raise RuntimeError(f"place_order không trả orderId: {r}")
        return str(oid)

    def cancel_order(self, order_id):
        r = self.client.cancel_order(self.account_id, order_id)
        self._log_raw("cancel_order", {"order_id": order_id, "resp": r})
        return r

    def poll_orders(self):
        rows = self.client.daily_orders(self.account_id) or []
        self._log_raw("daily_orders", rows)
        out = {}
        for o in rows:
            oid = qget(o, "orderid", "orderId", "id")
            if oid is None:
                continue
            [REDACTED] = _fnum(qget(o, "execqtty", "matchedqtty", "matchqtty",
                                "cumqty", "fillqty", "matchedqty", default=0)) or 0
            avg = normalize_price_vnd(_fnum(qget(o, "avgprice", "matchprice",
                                                 "execprice", "avgpx")))
            out[str(oid)] = OrderUpdate(oid, qget(o, "status", "orderstatus",
                                                  default=""), [REDACTED], avg, raw=o)
        return out


# --------------------------------------------------------------- DNSE live

class DNSEBroker(BrokerBase):
    """DNSE OpenAPI v2 (dnse_api.DNSEClient).

    Inquiry + market data chỉ cần api_key/secret (ký HMAC, không login);
    đặt/sửa/hủy lệnh cần trading-token (OTP smart/email, hiệu lực 8h, tự cache
    trong data/dnse_trading_token*.json — còn hạn thì không cần --otp).
    """

    name = "dnse"
    can_trade_live = True

    def __init__(self, account_id=None, otp=None, quote_only=False,
                 credentials_file=None, label="main"):
        self.account_id = account_id
        self.label = label
        self._otp = otp
        self.quote_only = quote_only
        self.credentials_file = credentials_file
        self.client = None
        self._quote_cache = {}      # symbol -> (ts, Quote)
        self._secdef_cache = {}     # symbol -> dict (trần/sàn/ref — tĩnh trong ngày)
        self._quote_ttl = 3.0
        self._raw_log = os.path.join(
            EXEC_DIR, f"dnse_raw_{dt.date.today():%Y-%m-%d}.jsonl")

    def connect(self):
        self.client = get_dnse_client(self.credentials_file)
        if self.quote_only:
            print("[dnse] chế độ quote-only (market data)")
            return self
        if self.account_id is None:
            accs = self.client.accounts()
            self._log_raw("accounts", accs)
            rows = accs.get("accounts") if isinstance(accs, dict) else accs
            if not rows:
                raise RuntimeError(f"[dnse:{self.label}] không thấy tiểu khoản: {accs}")
            self.account_id = qget(rows[0], "id", "accountno", "account")
        if self._otp is not None and not self.client.has_trading_token():
            self.client.create_trading_token(self._otp)
            print(f"[dnse] trading-token đã tạo ({self.label}, hạn 8h)")
        if not self.client.has_trading_token():
            print(f"[dnse] ⚠ chưa có trading-token ({self.label}) — inquiry OK, "
                  f"đặt lệnh sẽ bị từ chối (cần --otp; [REDACTED]: gửi mã bằng "
                  f"--send-otp trước)")
        print(f"[dnse] kết nối OK [{self.label}] tiểu khoản {self.account_id}")
        return self

    def get_cash(self):
        bal = self.client.balances(self.account_id)
        self._log_raw("balances", bal)
        row = bal[0] if isinstance(bal, list) and bal else bal
        if isinstance(row, dict) and isinstance(row.get("stock"), dict):
            row = row["stock"]          # balances thật: {"stock": {...}, "derivative": {...}}
        v = _fnum(qget(row, "availablecash", "withdrawablecash", "purchasingpower",
                       "cashavailable", "totalcash", "cash", "balance",
                       default=0))
        return v or 0.0

    def get_positions(self):
        r = self.client.positions(self.account_id)
        self._log_raw("positions", r)
        rows = r.get("positions") or r.get("data") if isinstance(r, dict) else r
        out = {}
        for p in rows or []:
            if str(qget(p, "status", default="OPEN")).upper() == "CLOSED":
                continue
            sym = qget(p, "symbol", "instrument", "code")
            total = int(_fnum(qget(p, "openquantity", "quantity", "totalquantity",
                                   "qty", default=0)) or 0)
            # tradeQuantity = KL bán được (đã về); accumulate có thể gồm CP chờ về
            sellable = int(_fnum(qget(p, "tradequantity", "availablequantity",
                                      "sellablequantity", "availableqty",
                                      default=total)) or total)
            if sym and total > 0:
                out[sym] = {"total": total, "sellable": sellable}
        return out

    @staticmethod
    def _pick_board(payload, list_key):
        """Payload DNSE: list các board (G1 lô chẵn, G4 lô lẻ, T* thỏa thuận)
        hoặc dict {list_key: [...]}. → dict của board G1 (ưu tiên) / đầu tiên."""
        rows = payload
        if isinstance(payload, dict):
            rows = payload.get(list_key) or payload.get("data") or [payload]
        if not isinstance(rows, list):
            return {}
        g1 = [r for r in rows if isinstance(r, dict) and r.get("boardId") == "G1"]
        rows = g1 or [r for r in rows if isinstance(r, dict)]
        return rows[0] if rows else {}

    def get_quote(self, symbol):
        import time as _t
        hit = self._quote_cache.get(symbol)
        if hit and _t.time() - hit[0] < self._quote_ttl:
            return hit[1]
        raw = {"symbol": symbol}
        # 1) secdef (trần/sàn/tham chiếu theo board) — tĩnh, cache cả phiên
        sd = self._secdef_cache.get(symbol)
        if sd is None:
            try:
                sd = self._pick_board(self.client.secdef(symbol), "secdefs")
                self._secdef_cache[symbol] = sd
            except Exception as e:
                sd = {}
                print(f"[dnse] ⚠ secdef {symbol} lỗi: {e}")
        raw.update(sd)
        # 2) khớp lệnh mới nhất — {"trades":[board G1: matchPrice, totalVolumeTraded]}
        try:
            raw.update(self._pick_board(self.client.latest_trade(symbol), "trades"))
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[dnse] ⚠ trade {symbol} lỗi: {e}")
        # 3) top giá chờ — {"quotes":[board G1: bid/offer = [{price, quantity},…]]}
        try:
            qt = self._pick_board(self.client.latest_quote(symbol), "quotes")
            for side_key, flat in (("bid", "bidPrice1"), ("bids", "bidPrice1"),
                                   ("offer", "offerPrice1"), ("offers", "offerPrice1"),
                                   ("asks", "offerPrice1")):
                arr = qt.get(side_key) if isinstance(qt, dict) else None
                if isinstance(arr, list) and arr:
                    top = arr[0]
                    raw.setdefault(flat, qget(top, "price", "p")
                                   if isinstance(top, dict) else top)
            if isinstance(qt, dict):
                raw.update({k: v for k, v in qt.items()
                            if not isinstance(v, (list, dict)) and k not in raw})
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[dnse] ⚠ quote {symbol} lỗi: {e}")
        q = Quote(raw)
        if not q.ok():
            self._log_raw("quote_unmapped", raw)
        self._quote_cache[symbol] = (_t.time(), q)
        return q

    def place_order(self, symbol, qty, side, price=None, order_type="LO"):
        r = self.client.place_order(self.account_id, symbol, qty=int(qty),
                                    side=side, order_type=order_type, price=price)
        self._log_raw("place_order", {"req": [symbol, qty, side, price, order_type],
                                      "resp": r})
        oid = qget(r, "id", "orderid", "orderId")
        if oid is None:
            raise RuntimeError(f"place_order không trả id: {r}")
        return str(oid)

    def cancel_order(self, order_id):
        r = self.client.cancel_order(self.account_id, order_id)
        self._log_raw("cancel_order", {"order_id": order_id, "resp": r})
        return r

    def poll_orders(self):
        r = self.client.orders(self.account_id)
        self._log_raw("orders", r)
        rows = r.get("orders") or r.get("data") if isinstance(r, dict) else r
        out = {}
        for o in rows or []:
            oid = qget(o, "id", "orderid", "orderId")
            if oid is None:
                continue
            [REDACTED] = _fnum(qget(o, "fillquantity", "[REDACTED]quantity", "cumqty",
                                "matchedquantity", "fillqty", "execqtty",
                                default=0)) or 0
            avg = normalize_price_vnd(_fnum(qget(o, "averageprice", "avgprice",
                                                 "fillprice", "matchprice")))
            out[str(oid)] = OrderUpdate(oid, qget(o, "orderstatus", "status",
                                                  default=""), [REDACTED], avg, raw=o)
        return out


# --------------------------------------------------------------- Paper sim

class PaperBroker(BrokerBase):
    """Khớp mô phỏng trên quote thật. Lệnh LO mua khớp khi limit ≥ ask (hoặc last),
    bán khớp khi limit ≤ bid (hoặc last); ATO/ATC khớp ngay tại ref/last.
    Trạng thái tiền + danh mục: data/bot_paper_account.json (bền qua nhiều phiên).
    """

    name = "paper"
    can_trade_live = False

    def __init__(self, init_cash=1_000_000_000, fee_rate=0.0015, quote_source=None,
                 fill_at_ref_if_no_quote=False, label="main"):
        self.fee_rate = fee_rate
        self.quote_source = quote_source        # PHSBroker (chỉ dùng quote) hoặc None
        self.fill_at_ref = fill_at_ref_if_no_quote
        self.label = label
        self.state_file = (PAPER_STATE_FILE if label == "main"
                           else os.path.join(DATA_DIR, f"bot_paper_{label}.json"))
        self._init_cash = init_cash
        self.state = None
        self._fallback_ref = {}                 # symbol -> ref_price từ plan (offline)

    def connect(self):
        if self.quote_source is not None:
            try:
                if self.quote_source.client is None:
                    self.quote_source.connect()
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[paper] ⚠ không kết nối được PHS quote ({e}) — "
                      f"dùng ref_price của plan làm giá mô phỏng")
                self.quote_source = None
        self._load()
        print(f"[paper] tài khoản ảo [{self.label}]: cash "
              f"{self.state['cash']/1e6:,.0f}M, {len(self.state['positions'])} mã")
        return self

    # ----- state -----
    def _load(self):
        if os.path.exists(self.state_file):
            with open(self.state_file, encoding="utf-8") as f:
                self.state = json.load(f)
        else:
            self.state = {"cash": self._init_cash, "positions": {},
                          "open_orders": {}, "fills": [], "next_id": 1}
            self._save()
        self.state.setdefault("open_orders", {})
        self.state.setdefault("fills", [])

    def _save(self):
        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(self.state_file), exist_ok=True)
        with open(self.state_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            json.dump(self.state, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)

    def set_fallback_refs(self, mapping):
        """{symbol: ref_price} từ plan — giá mô phỏng khi không có quote PHS."""
        self._fallback_ref.update(mapping or {})

    # ----- interface -----
    def get_cash(self):
        return float(self.state["cash"])

    def get_positions(self):
        return {s: {"total": int(q), "sellable": int(q)}
                for s, q in self.state["positions"].items() if q > 0}

    def get_quote(self, symbol):
        if self.quote_source is not None:
            q = self.quote_source.get_quote(symbol)
            if q and q.ok():
                return q
        ref = self._fallback_ref.get(symbol)
        if ref:
            return Quote({"symbol": symbol, "refPrice": ref, "lastPrice": ref})
        return None

    def place_order(self, symbol, qty, side, price=None, order_type="LO"):
        oid = f"P{self.state['next_id']:06d}"
        self.state["next_id"] += 1
        self.state["open_orders"][oid] = {
            "symbol": symbol, "qty": int(qty), "side": side, "price": price,
            "type": order_type, "[REDACTED]": 0, "status": "open",
            "ts": dt.datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds")}
        self._try_fill(oid)
        self._save()
        return oid

    def cancel_order(self, order_id):
        o = self.state["open_orders"].get(order_id)
        if o and o["status"] == "open":
            o["status"] = "cancelled"
            self._save()
        return {"orderId": order_id, "status": "cancelled"}

    def poll_orders(self):
        for oid in list(self.state["open_orders"]):
            self._try_fill(oid)
        self._save()
        return {oid: OrderUpdate(oid, o["status"], o["[REDACTED]"], o.get("avg_price"))
                for oid, o in self.state["open_orders"].items()}

    # ----- fill engine -----
    def _try_fill(self, oid):
        o = self.state["open_orders"][oid]
        if o["status"] != "open":
            return
        q = self.get_quote(o["symbol"])
        if q is None or not q.ok():
            return
        last = q.last or q.ref
        fill_px = None
        if o["type"] in ("ATO", "ATC"):
            fill_px = last
        elif o["price"] is None:
            fill_px = last
        else:
            if o["side"] == "buy":
                mkt = q.ask or last
                if mkt is not None and o["price"] >= mkt:
                    fill_px = min(o["price"], mkt)
            else:
                mkt = q.bid or last
                if mkt is not None and o["price"] <= mkt:
                    fill_px = mkt
        if fill_px is None:
            return
        qty = o["qty"] - o["[REDACTED]"]
        value = qty * fill_px
        fee = value * self.fee_rate
        if o["side"] == "buy":
            if self.state["cash"] < value + fee:
                o["status"] = "rejected_cash"
                return
            self.state["cash"] -= value + fee
            self.state["positions"][o["symbol"]] = \
                self.state["positions"].get(o["symbol"], 0) + qty
        else:
            have = self.state["positions"].get(o["symbol"], 0)
            if have < qty:
                o["status"] = "rejected_qty"
                return
            self.state["cash"] += value - fee
            self.state["positions"][o["symbol"]] = have - qty
        o["[REDACTED]"] = o["qty"]
        o["avg_price"] = fill_px
        o["status"] = "[REDACTED]"
        self.state["fills"].append(
            {"ts": dt.datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"), "order_id": oid,
             "symbol": o["symbol"], "side": o["side"], "qty": qty,
             "price": fill_px, "fee": round(fee)})


BROKER_CLASSES = {"phs": PHSBroker, "dnse": DNSEBroker}

# Pool nguồn quote dùng chung (1 per broker-type × credentials) cho paper accounts
_QUOTE_POOL = {}


def get_quote_source(broker_type, credentials_file=None):
    key = (broker_type, os.path.abspath(credentials_file or "default"))
    if key not in _QUOTE_POOL:
        cls = BROKER_CLASSES[broker_type]
        _QUOTE_POOL[key] = cls(quote_only=True, credentials_file=credentials_file)
    return _QUOTE_POOL[key]


def make_broker(cfg, otp=None, need_quotes=True, profile=None, quote_src=None):
    """Factory theo mode + broker. profile = account profile
    (label/broker/credentials_file/account_id); broker: "phs" | "dnse".
    quote_src override nguồn quote cho paper (mặc định pool theo broker)."""
    p = profile or {"label": "main", "credentials_file": None,
                    "account_id": cfg.get("account_id")}
    btype = (p.get("broker") or cfg.get("broker") or "phs").lower()
    if btype not in BROKER_CLASSES:
        raise KeyError(f"broker '{btype}' không hỗ trợ — có: {sorted(BROKER_CLASSES)}")
    if cfg["mode"] == "live":
        return BROKER_CLASSES[btype](account_id=p.get("account_id"), otp=otp,
                                     credentials_file=p.get("credentials_file"),
                                     label=p["label"])
    if quote_src is None and need_quotes:
        quote_src = get_quote_source(btype, p.get("credentials_file"))
    return PaperBroker(init_cash=cfg["paper_init_cash"],
                       fee_rate=cfg["paper_fee_rate"],
                       quote_source=quote_src, label=p["label"])

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Bước 2 — Thực thi trading plan trong phiên (chạy sáng trước 09:15, để chạy cả ngày).

  python bot_execute.py                       # MỌI account có plan hôm nay, 1 process
  python bot_execute.py --account main        # chỉ 1 account (lặp lại được)
  python bot_execute.py --otp main=123456 --otp acc2=654321   # Smart OTP theo account
  python bot_execute.py --otp 123456          # 1 OTP áp cho mọi account live cùng login
  python bot_execute.py --date [REDACTED]13     # ép ngày plan
  python bot_execute.py --once                # 1 vòng rồi thoát (debug)
  python bot_execute.py --force-phase MORNING # test ngoài giờ (paper)
  python bot_execute.py --probe HPG [--broker dnse]  # dump quote thô rồi thoát
  python bot_execute.py --send-otp acc_dnse   # gửi email OTP (DNSE [REDACTED]) rồi thoát

Tất cả account chạy trong MỘT vòng lặp, dùng chung quota participation
(các tài khoản không tự cạnh tranh nhau trên cùng một mã).
Dừng khẩn cấp: tạo file data/BOT_STOP (hủy lệnh treo MỌI account rồi thoát).
Giết process giữa chừng vô hại — chạy lại là resume từ state đã lưu.
"""

import argparse
import datetime as dt
import json
import sys

if hasattr(sys.stdout, "reconfigure"):  # console Windows cp1252 → utf-8
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    sys.stderr.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

from trading_bot.config import load_config, load_accounts, pick_accounts
from trading_bot.brokers import make_broker, get_quote_source, get_dnse_client
from trading_bot.plan import load_plan
from trading_bot.executor import Executor, run_session


def parse_otp(items):
    """["main=123456","acc2=654321"] hoặc ["123456"] → (dict label→otp, otp chung)."""
    per, common = {}, None
    for it in items or []:
        if "=" in it:
            k, v = it.split("=", 1)
            per[k.strip()] = v.strip()
        else:
            common = it.strip()
    return per, common


def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Thực thi trading plan (đa tài khoản)")
    ap.add_argument("--account", action="append", default=None,
                    help="label account (lặp lại được); mặc định mọi account enabled")
    ap.add_argument("--date", default=None, help="plan date YYYY-MM-DD (mặc định hôm nay)")
    ap.add_argument("--mode", default=None, choices=["paper", "live"],
                    help="override mode cho MỌI account được chọn")
    ap.add_argument("--otp", action="append", default=None,
                    help="Smart OTP: 'label=123456' (lặp lại) hoặc '123456' chung")
    ap.add_argument("--once", action="store_true", help="chạy 1 vòng rồi thoát")
    ap.add_argument("--max-cycles", type=int, default=None)
    ap.add_argument("--force-phase", default=None,
                    choices=["MORNING", "AFTERNOON", "ATC"], help="test ngoài giờ")
    ap.add_argument("--probe", default=None, metavar="SYMBOL",
                    help="in payload quote thô của 1 mã rồi thoát")
    ap.add_argument("--broker", default="phs", choices=["phs", "dnse"],
                    help="broker cho --probe")
    ap.add_argument("--send-otp", default=None, metavar="LABEL",
                    help="gửi email OTP cho account DNSE ([REDACTED]) rồi thoát")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    if args.probe:
        b = get_quote_source(args.broker).connect()
        q = b.get_quote(args.probe)
        print(json.dumps(q.raw if q else None, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False, default=str))
        print("\nparsed:", q)
        return 0

    base = load_config()

    if args.send_otp:
        profiles = pick_accounts(load_accounts(base), [args.send_otp])
        c = get_dnse_client(profiles[0].get("credentials_file"))
        c.send_[REDACTED]()
        print(f"✅ đã gửi OTP vào email (hạn 2 phút) — chạy lại với "
              f"--otp {args.send_otp}=<mã>")
        return 0
    profiles = pick_accounts(load_accounts(base), args.account)
    otp_by_label, otp_common = parse_otp(args.otp)
    plan_date = args.date or dt.date.today().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")

    shared_fills = {}                            # sổ participation chung của fleet

    executors = []
    for p in profiles:
        cfg = dict(p["cfg"])
        if args.mode:
            cfg["mode"] = args.mode
        plan = load_plan(plan_date, account=p["label"])
        if plan is None:
            print(f"[{p['label']}] không có plan cho {plan_date} — bỏ qua "
                  f"(chạy bot_prepare_plan.py trước)")
            continue
        if not plan.orders:
            print(f"[{p['label']}] plan {plan_date} không có lệnh — bỏ qua")
            continue
        otp = otp_by_label.get(p["label"], otp_common)
        if cfg["mode"] == "live" and otp is None:
            print(f"⚠ [{p['label']}] mode live chưa có --otp: nếu otp_token cache "
                  f"còn hạn vẫn chạy được, hết hạn lệnh sẽ bị từ chối.")
        broker = make_broker(cfg, otp=otp, profile=p).connect()
        if cfg["mode"] == "paper" and hasattr(broker, "set_fallback_refs"):
            broker.set_fallback_refs({o.ticker: o.ref_price for o in plan.orders})
        executors.append(Executor(plan, broker, cfg, shared=shared_fills))

    if not executors:
        sys.exit(f"❌ không có account nào có plan thực thi cho {plan_date}.")

    run_session(executors, once=args.once, max_cycles=args.max_cycles,
                force_phase=args.force_phase)
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

content.content:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Bước 1 — Chuẩn bị trading plan từ V2.3 (chạy EOD sau golive_recommend_v23 + pt_v22_dt5g).

  python bot_prepare_plan.py                    # MỌI account enabled trong
                                                # data/trading_bot_accounts.json
  python bot_prepare_plan.py --account main     # chỉ 1 account (lặp lại được)
  python bot_prepare_plan.py --date [REDACTED]12  # ép signal date
  python bot_prepare_plan.py --dry              # chỉ in, không ghi file plan

Output: data/trade_plans/plan_<account>_<T+1>.json — đầu vào của bot_execute.py.
Mỗi account tự scale theo NAV của chính nó (plan độc lập hoàn toàn).
"""

import argparse
import sys

if hasattr(sys.stdout, "reconfigure"):  # console Windows cp1252 → utf-8
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    sys.stderr.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

from trading_bot.config import load_config, load_accounts, pick_accounts
from trading_bot.brokers import make_broker
from trading_bot.strategies import get_strategy


def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Chuẩn bị trading plan (đa tài khoản)")
    ap.add_argument("--account", action="append", default=None,
                    help="label account (lặp lại được); mặc định mọi account enabled")
    ap.add_argument("--date", default=None, help="signal date YYYY-MM-DD")
    ap.add_argument("--strategy", default=None, help="override config strategy")
    ap.add_argument("--mode", default=None, choices=["paper", "live"],
                    help="override mode cho MỌI account được chọn")
    ap.add_argument("--dry", action="store_true", help="chỉ in plan, không ghi file")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    base = load_config()
    profiles = pick_accounts(load_accounts(base), args.account)
    if not profiles:
        sys.exit("không có account nào enabled — sửa data/trading_bot_accounts.json")

    written = []
    for p in profiles:
        cfg = dict(p["cfg"])
        if args.mode:
            cfg["mode"] = args.mode
        strat = get_strategy(args.strategy or cfg["strategy"])
        # nguồn quote paper được pool theo (broker, credentials) trong make_broker
        broker = make_broker(cfg, profile=p).connect()
        plan = strat.build_plan(cfg, broker, signal_date=args.date)
        plan.account = p["label"]
        print()
        print(plan.summary())
        if not args.dry:
            written.append(plan.save())

    if args.dry:
        print("\n(dry — không ghi file)")
        return
    print(f"\n✅ đã ghi {len(written)} plan:")
    for w in written:
        print(f"   {w}")
    print("   thực thi trong phiên kế tiếp:  python bot_execute.py")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

from trading_bot.config import load_config, load_accounts, pick_accounts
from trading_bot.brokers import make_broker

def main():

    ap.add_argument("--account", action="append", default=None,
                    help="label account (lặp lại được); mặc định mọi account enabled")

    profiles = pick_accounts(load_accounts(base), args.account)
    if not profiles:
        sys.exit("không có account nào enabled — sửa data/trading_bot_accounts.json")

    written = []
    for p in profiles:
        cfg = dict(p["cfg"])
        if args.mode:
            cfg["mode"] = args.mode
        strat = get_strategy(args.strategy or cfg["strategy"])
        # nguồn quote paper được pool theo (broker, credentials) trong make_broker
        broker = make_broker(cfg, profile=p).connect()
        plan = strat.build_plan(cfg, broker, signal_date=args.date)
        plan.account = p["label"]
        print()
        print(plan.summary())
        if not args.dry:
            written.append(plan.save())

    if args.dry:
        print("\n(dry — không ghi file)")
        return
    print(f"\n✅ đã ghi {len(written)} plan:")
    for w in written:
        print(f"   {w}")
    print("   thực thi trong phiên kế tiếp:  python bot_execute.py")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Cấu hình bot — đọc/ghi data/trading_bot_config.json (tạo mặc định nếu chưa có)."""

import json
import os

WORKDIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
DATA_DIR = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data")
PLAN_DIR = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, "trade_plans")
EXEC_DIR = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, "execution_logs")
CONFIG_FILE = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, "trading_bot_config.json")
ACCOUNTS_FILE = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, "trading_bot_accounts.json")
STOP_FILE = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, "BOT_STOP")          # tạo file này → bot dừng + hủy lệnh treo

DEFAULTS = {
    # --- chung ---
    "mode": "paper",                  # "paper" | "live"
    "broker": "phs",                  # "phs" | "dnse" (per-account override được)
    "strategy": "v23",                # key trong strategies.REGISTRY
    "account_id": None,               # None → tiểu khoản đầu tiên từ PHS
    "etf_symbol": "E1VFVN30",
    "include_etf_park": True,         # mirror cả phần park ETF của paper book

    # --- sizing / mirror ---
    "paper_init_cash": 1_000_000_000, # tiền ảo khởi tạo cho PaperBroker (VND)
    "min_order_value": 5_000_000,     # bỏ qua lệnh < 5M VND (dust)
    "qty_tolerance_pct": 0.05,        # |lệch| < 5% target → không phát lệnh sync

    # --- slicing / execution ---
    "max_child_value": 200_000_000,   # VND tối đa mỗi lệnh con
    "max_participation": 0.10,        # mua/bán ≤ 10% KL khớp lũy kế trong ngày của mã
    "slice_interval_min": 8,          # phút giữa 2 lệnh con cùng một parent
    "poll_interval_sec": 20,          # chu kỳ poll sổ lệnh + quote
    "chase_ticks": 1,                 # mua: đặt bid + n tick (passive); 0 = đặt ngay bid
    "buy_cross_spread": True,         # True: mua đặt thẳng giá ask (ưu tiên khớp)
    "max_chase_pct_buy": 0.015,       # trần đuổi giá mua = ref_plan × (1+1.5%)
    "max_chase_pct_sell": 0.03,       # sàn đuổi giá bán = ref_plan × (1−3%)
    "atc_remainder_sell": True,       # phần bán còn sót → quét ATC
    "atc_remainder_buy": False,       # phần mua còn sót → mặc định bỏ (mai plan mới tự sync)
    "paper_fee_rate": 0.0015,         # phí mô phỏng paper (0.15% mỗi chiều)

    # --- an toàn ---
    "max_orders_per_day": 60,         # tổng số parent order tối đa trong 1 plan
    "max_daily_gross_value": 20_000_000_000,  # tổng GTGD tối đa 1 ngày (VND)
}


ACCOUNT_DEFAULTS = {
    "label": "main",            # tên định danh — namespace mọi file plan/state/journal
    "enabled": True,
    "mode": None,               # None → dùng mode chung trong trading_bot_config.json
    "broker": None,             # None → broker chung; "phs" | "dnse"
    "credentials_file": None,   # None → creds mặc định theo broker
    "account_id": None,         # None → tiểu khoản đầu tiên của login/key đó
    "note": "",
    "overrides": {},            # override bất kỳ khóa nào của config chung cho riêng account
}


def load_accounts(cfg, path=ACCOUNTS_FILE):
    """Đọc danh sách account profile; chưa có file → tạo template 1 profile 'main'.

    Trả về list profile đã chuẩn hóa, mỗi profile có thêm khóa "cfg" = config
    hiệu lực (config chung + overrides + mode/account_id của profile).
    """
    if os.path.exists(path):
        with open(path, encoding="utf-8") as f:
            raw = json.load(f).get("accounts", [])
    else:
        raw = [{"label": "main", "mode": cfg["mode"],
                "account_id": cfg.get("account_id"),
                "note": "profile mặc định — thêm account mới vào danh sách này"}]
        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path), exist_ok=True)
        with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            json.dump({"accounts": raw}, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
        print(f"[config] tạo file account profile mặc định: {path}")

    profiles, seen = [], set()
    for r in raw:
        p = dict(ACCOUNT_DEFAULTS)
        p.update(r)
        if p["label"] in seen:
            raise ValueError(f"trùng label account '{p['label']}' trong {path}")
        seen.add(p["label"])
        eff = dict(cfg)
        eff.update(p.get("overrides") or {})
        eff["mode"] = p["mode"] or cfg["mode"]
        eff["account_id"] = p["account_id"]
        p["cfg"] = eff
        profiles.append(p)
    return profiles


def pick_accounts(profiles, labels=None):
    """Lọc profile theo --account labels; mặc định = mọi profile enabled."""
    if labels:
        by = {p["label"]: p for p in profiles}
        missing = [l for l in labels if l not in by]
        if missing:
            raise KeyError(f"không có account {missing} — có: {sorted(by)}")
        return [by[l] for l in labels]
    return [p for p in profiles if p["enabled"]]


def load_config(path=CONFIG_FILE):
    cfg = dict(DEFAULTS)
    if os.path.exists(path):
        with open(path, encoding="utf-8") as f:
            user = json.load(f)
        unknown = sorted(set(user) - set(DEFAULTS))
        if unknown:
            print(f"[config] ⚠ khóa lạ trong {os.path.basename(path)}: {unknown}")
        cfg.update(user)
    else:
        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path), exist_ok=True)
        with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            json.dump(DEFAULTS, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
        print(f"[config] tạo file cấu hình mặc định: {path}")
    return cfg

# ------------------------------------------------------------ pricing/sizing

    def _limit_price(self, o, q):
        """Giá LO cho lệnh con; None = không đặt được (thiếu quote)."""
        ex = q.exchange or "HOSE"
        last = q.last or q.ref or o.ref_price
        tick = tick_size(last, o.ticker, ex)
        if o.side == "buy":
            cap = o.ref_price * (1 + self.cfg["max_chase_pct_buy"])
            if q.ceiling:
                cap = min(cap, q.ceiling)
            cross = self.cfg["buy_cross_spread"] or o.urgency == "high"
            desired = (q.ask if (cross and q.ask) else
                       (q.bid + self.cfg["chase_ticks"] * tick) if q.bid else last)
            px = min(desired, cap)
            px = round_price(px, o.ticker, ex, "down")
            if q.floor:
                px = max(px, q.floor)
        else:
            floor_cap = o.ref_price * (1 - self.cfg["max_chase_pct_sell"])
            if q.floor:
                floor_cap = max(floor_cap, q.floor)
            desired = q.bid if q.bid else last - self.cfg["chase_ticks"] * tick
            px = max(desired, floor_cap)
            px = round_price(px, o.ticker, ex, "up")
            if q.ceiling:
                px = min(px, q.ceiling)
        return px if px and px > 0 else None
input.new_string:
# ------------------------------------------------------------ pricing/sizing

    def _record_prices(self, now, phase):
        """Lấy mẫu giá last mỗi px_sample_sec cho các mã còn lệnh → px_hist (tính r15).
        get_quote có TTL cache 3s nên chi phí ~1 call/phút/mã."""
        if phase in ("PRE", "CLOSED"):
            return
        hist = self.state.setdefault("px_hist", {})
        keep_from = (now - dt.timedelta(minutes=40)).isoformat(timespec="seconds")
        for o in self.plan.orders:
            if self.state["parents"][o.id]["done"]:
                continue
            h = hist.setdefault(o.ticker, [])
            if h and (now - dt.datetime.fromisoformat(h[-1][0])).total_seconds() \
                    < self.cfg["px_sample_sec"]:
                continue
            q = self.broker.get_quote(o.ticker)
            if q and q.ok() and q.last:
                h.append([now.isoformat(timespec="seconds"), q.last])
                hist[o.ticker] = [s for s in h if s[0] >= keep_from]

    def _r15(self, ticker, now):
        """Return ~dip_window_min phút gần nhất từ px_hist; None = chưa đủ lịch sử."""
        h = self.state.get("px_hist", {}).get(ticker) or []
        if not h:
            return None
        # mẫu hiện tại phải tươi (≤2 chu kỳ sample)
        if (now - dt.datetime.fromisoformat(h[-1][0])).total_seconds() \
                > 2 * self.cfg["px_sample_sec"] + 5:
            return None
        win = self.cfg["dip_window_min"]
        best = None
        for ts, px in h:
            age = (now - dt.datetime.fromisoformat(ts)).total_seconds() / 60.0
            if 0.7 * win <= age <= 2.0 * win and \
                    (best is None or abs(age - win) < abs(best[0] - win)):
                best = (age, px)
        if best is None or best[1] <= 0:
            return None
        return h[-1][1] / best[1] - 1.0

    def _decide_cross(self, o, now):
        """→ (cross: bool, note). cross_mode="dip" (S2, backtest [REDACTED]12): giá 15'
        vừa đi NGƯỢC hướng lệnh → cross ngay (mua sau dip / bán sau nhịp tăng);
        vừa chạy CÙNG hướng → passive chờ hồi (mean-reversion 15-30').
        Thiếu lịch sử giá → cross (fallback = hành vi cũ, fail-safe)."""
        if o.urgency == "high":
            return True, ""
        if self.cfg.get("cross_mode", "[REDACTED]") != "dip":
            return (bool(self.cfg["buy_cross_spread"]) if o.side == "buy" else True), ""
        r = self._r15(o.ticker, now)
        if r is None:
            return True, "dip:no-hist"
        side = 1 if o.side == "buy" else -1
        if r * side <= 0:
            return True, f"dip:cross r15={r*100:+.2f}%"
        return False, f"dip:passive r15={r*100:+.2f}%"

    def _limit_price(self, o, q, cross=True):
        """Giá LO cho lệnh con; None = không đặt được (thiếu quote)."""
        ex = q.exchange or "HOSE"
        last = q.last or q.ref or o.ref_price
        tick = tick_size(last, o.ticker, ex)
        if o.side == "buy":
            cap = o.ref_price * (1 + self.cfg["max_chase_pct_buy"])
            if q.ceiling:
                cap = min(cap, q.ceiling)
            desired = (q.ask if (cross and q.ask) else
                       (q.bid + self.cfg["chase_ticks"] * tick) if q.bid else last)
            px = min(desired, cap)
            px = round_price(px, o.ticker, ex, "down")
            if q.floor:
                px = max(px, q.floor)
        else:
            floor_cap = o.ref_price * (1 - self.cfg["max_chase_pct_sell"])
            if q.floor:
                floor_cap = max(floor_cap, q.floor)
            if cross:
                desired = q.bid if q.bid else last - self.cfg["chase_ticks"] * tick
            else:   # passive sell: nằm ở ask chờ nhịp hồi chạm tới
                desired = q.ask if q.ask else last + self.cfg["chase_ticks"] * tick
            px = max(desired, floor_cap)
            px = round_price(px, o.ticker, ex, "up")
            if q.ceiling:
                px = min(px, q.ceiling)
        return px if px and px > 0 else None
